channel.title: Hello Traveler on My Personal Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Hello Traveler on My Personal Homepage

item.title: My Personal Homepage
item.description: So. This is my personal homepage. Or maybe I should say that it will be it somethimes soon.

item.title: Open Learning
item.description: Here I share sources for autonomous learning on the internet. The idea is by and large inspired by Una Kravets. In high school I had the epiphany that it is better to follow good teachers thengood topics. Throughout my studies I tried to follow that maxim as good as possible, but forgot about it until recently. Albeit my pursuits follow topics, I will try to keep this in mind for this list.

item.title: Projects
